description: Find if the provided appId's game/DLC is owned by the currently logged Steam account.
examples:
<sqf>
if (isAppSubscribed 107410) then { systemChat "You have Arma 3, my dude!"; };
if (isAppSubscribed 571710) then { systemChat "You even own Laws of War, excellent!!"; };
</sqf>
name: isAppSubscribed

ret.desc: [[true]] if the current Steam account has said app, [[false]] otherwise
